identity: Stalwart human male warrior, square-jawed, short-cropped brown hair, weathered face with a faint scar across the cheek. Muscular build. Confident brown eyes.
outfit: Battle-worn steel plate armor with iron pauldrons, brown leather belt with a satchel, crimson surcoat over the breastplate. Heavy armored boots. Red cape clasped at the shoulders.
weapons: A broad two-handed steel longsword, held upright in the right hand, point-down near his feet. No shield.
attackStyle: East-facing. Mid-swing of the longsword, blade arcing forward at head height, both hands gripping the hilt. Red cape flares back.
spellStyle: East-facing. Longsword raised overhead in both hands, tip pointed skyward, a faint golden glow along the blade. Head tilted up.
blockStyle: East-facing. Longsword held vertically in front, both hands on the hilt, blade guarding the torso. Shoulders squared, chin down.
koStyle: East-facing, fallen forward on one knee, longsword dropped beside him on the ground. Head bowed, one hand pressing into the dirt.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), relaxed idle stance. Longsword resting point-down at his feet, both hands on the pommel. Calm confident gaze.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Weathered face, scar visible on cheek, short brown hair. Steel plate and red cape visible on shoulders.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Stalwart human male warrior, square-jawed, short-cropped brown hair, weathered face with a faint scar across the cheek. Muscular build. Confident brown eyes.

OUTFIT: Battle-worn steel plate armor with iron pauldrons, brown leather belt with a satchel, crimson surcoat over the breastplate. Heavy armored boots. Red cape clasped at the shoulders.

WEAPONS: A broad two-handed steel longsword, held upright in the right hand, point-down near his feet. No shield.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Stalwart human male warrior, square-jawed, short-cropped brown hair, weathered face with a faint scar across the cheek. Muscular build. Confident brown eyes.

OUTFIT: Battle-worn steel plate armor with iron pauldrons, brown leather belt with a satchel, crimson surcoat over the breastplate. Heavy armored boots. Red cape clasped at the shoulders.

WEAPONS: A broad two-handed steel longsword, held upright in the right hand, point-down near his feet. No shield.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Weathered face, scar visible on cheek, short brown hair. Steel plate and red cape visible on shoulders.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
